Tiny Bookshop is an indie game made with love by a small team of book lovers, meant to bring a tiny utopia where bookselling dreams can come true to YOUR screens!

TRY BEFORE YOU BUY
You can try the first three days of the game for free! And if you like it, the full Tiny Bookshop experience is only a one-time purchase away! There are no ads or micro transactions in the game.

HIGHLIGHTS
* Decorate your Tiny Bookshop with the items you collect. Are you into absolutely plastering it with plants? Maybe a spooky candle-lit atmosphere is more your style? Every item also has an effect on your customers and can introduce new mechanics.
* Recommend real books to your customers, match the right book to the right person – or try to expand their literary horizon! Sometimes they just need a little help finding a book they will love!
* Befriend Bookstonbury's quirky cast of characters and help each other out!
* Stock books of different genres to satisfy the locals’ reading habits and watch your customers trickle in. Every place around town attracts a slightly different crowd, so get to know your audience and become a master bookseller!
* Explore the scenic places of charming Bookstonbury-by-the-Sea and learn the ins and outs

newReleases.name: Daily Drop: Sports Trivia
newReleases.desc:
One sports quiz. Every day. Same seven questions for everyone.

Daily Drop is the daily ritual for baseball and football fans. Each day drops a fresh set of 7 questions - 4 MLB, 3 NFL - pulled from real stats and history. Everyone in the world gets the exact same set, so you and your group are always playing the same game.

Answer, lock it in, and watch your card come together like a broadcast stat overlay. Then share your score grid and see who read the box score this morning.

HOW IT WORKS
- 7 questions a day: 4 MLB, 3 NFL
- Mix of multiple choice and type-the-answer with autocomplete
- Real facts: season leaders, draft rounds, colleges, jersey numbers, and more
- The same set for everyone, every day - no two days repeat

KEEP YOUR STREAK
- Play every day to build your streak
- Miss a day and it resets - that's the game
- Track your accuracy, best streak, and perfect cards on your stats screen

SHARE YOUR SCORE
- A clean, collectible scorecard built to screenshot
- Share your result grid and challenge your friends
- Bragging rights, settled daily

BUILT RIGHT
- Works offline with instant load, no spinner
- Light and dark mode
- No account required. No data collected.

New questions drop daily. How long can you keep the streak alive?

Not affiliated with or endorsed by MLB or NFL.

newReleases.name: Hear With Eyes
newReleases.desc:
Hear with Eyes

How much of a conversation can you understand without relying on sound?

Hear with Eyes is an interactive quiz game that lets hearing users experience one aspect of deaf and hard-of-hearing communication through lip reading. Instead of simply explaining the challenges of lip reading, the app invites you to experience them firsthand.

Watch short lip movement animations and guess the spoken word using visual information. A faint, muffled audio cue is available, but the primary source of information is what you see—not what you hear.

Features

• Four difficulty levels from Easy to Extreme

• Progressive gameplay that encourages observation and inference

• Replay-based scoring system that rewards careful listening and viewing

• Clean and intuitive interface designed for focused learning

• Fully playable without relying on audio

Why Hear with Eyes?

Many people assume that sign language is the primary communication method for all deaf individuals. In reality, many deaf and hard-of-hearing people also use lip reading, spoken language, writing, gestures, or a combination of communication methods.

Hear with Eyes was created to encourage empathy through direct experience rather than explanation.

This app is not intended to replicate the lived experience of deaf or hard-of-hearing individuals. Instead, it offers an opportunity to better understand some of the cognitive effort involved in lip-reading–based communication.

• Math Skills: Fire up your mental math with "Calculation Rush" and "Math Shooter."

TRACK YOUR NEURO PERFORMANCE
Measure your cognitive growth with the NeuroSprint Index (NSI). Our intelligent ELO-based scoring system dynamically adjusts the difficulty to match your unique skill level, ensuring you are always challenged but never overwhelmed. Watch your rank climb from Beginner to Genius!

DAILY STREAKS & DETAILED STATS
Build healthy habits with daily training streaks. Dive deep into your post-game statistics to see exactly where you excel and where you can improve.

PRIVACY FIRST (LOCAL DATA)
Your brain data belongs to you. NeuroSprint is designed with a privacy-first approach, processing and storing your game statistics and performance metrics securely and locally on your device.

newReleases.name: SkeetGolf
newReleases.desc:
Skeet Golf turns your iPhone into a gun scope. Tilt to aim at clay targets flying across the sky, then tap to fire — no joystick, no virtual buttons, just your phone's gyroscope.

Every hole is scored like golf: clear it in as few shooting rounds ("pulls") as you can, and try to beat par. Take your time — there's no clock. Read the hole, plan your shots, and close the app whenever you like. Your round is saved exactly where you left it.

FEATURES
- Gyroscope aiming — point your phone, don't drag a stick
- 18 hand-built holes across 6 distinct worlds, from a sunny driving range to a golden-sunrise grand finale
- Golf-style scoring: fewer pulls, better score, just like real golf
- Moving targets, wind, obstacles, and armored clays that take more than one hit
- A full round-history leaderboard — track your best rounds over time
- Unlockable guns with different feel and tradeoffs
- 100% free — no ads, no pay-to-win

Skeet Golf is built for pick-up-and-play sessions but rewards mastery: better aim and smarter shot selection both lower your score. Whether you've got two minutes or twenty, there's always one more to play.
newReleases.coreLoop: Skeet Golf turns your iPhone into a gun scope. Tilt to aim at clay targets flying across the sky, then tap to fire — no joystick, no virtual buttons, just your phone's gyroscope.

newReleases.name: Chrono-Tithe: Turn Timer
newReleases.desc:
We have all been trapped in that pod. The board is a clogged mess, someone has been staring at their hand for ten minutes trying to sequence a cantrip, your cold brew is empty, and you are aging in real time.

Enter Chrono-Tithe.

Chrono-Tithe is not just a sleek life counter. It is an automated tax collector for slow play. Instead of a passive chess clock everyone ignores, it enforces an escalating “Tithe Tax.” Overstay your welcome in the think tank and your life total starts draining automatically. It is the perfect way to keep the table moving, or to quietly pressure the pod while you assemble your lock behind a wall of artifacts.

CORE FEATURES (always free)

THE TITHE ENGINE: An escalating turn timer that ramps through four tiers, from Standard to Accelerated to Punishing to Lethal. Choose the turn the tax starts to tighten and watch it change the way your pod plays.

BLIND-TAP LIFE TRACKING: Zero-friction split cards. Tap the right side of a player’s color block to gain life, tap the left to lose it. Press and hold to swing by 5 at a time. You never have to take your eyes off the board.

FULL COMMANDER TRACKING: Poison, energy, experience, +1/+1, commander tax, and per-source commander damage, with 21 from a single commander tracked and flagged automatically. Monarch and the Initiative too.

BUILT FOR THE TABLE: 2 to 6 players, format presets for Commander, 1v1, Two-Headed Giant, and Brawl, a pre-game lobby to set seating and decide who goes first, plus a dice roller,

newReleases.name: Block Fall Logic Puzzle

Roll the block, solve the puzzle, and drop it into the hole. Simple to learn, seriously hard to master.

Cube Fall Logic Puzzle is a brain-twisting 3D block rolling game inspired by classic block-rolling puzzles. Tip and roll your cube across floating tiles, avoid falling off the edge, and land perfectly into the goal. Every move counts — one wrong roll and you start again!

WHY YOU'LL LOVE IT

• Easy one-swipe controls — swipe up, down, left, or right to roll
• Hundreds of handcrafted levels, from relaxing warm-ups to true brain-burners
• Clever mechanics: switches, bridges, split tiles, and traps
• Minimal, satisfying 3D design that's easy on the eyes
• Unlockable cube skins to make each roll your own
• 100% playable offline — no wifi needed
• No pressure, no timer — solve at your own pace

TRAIN YOUR BRAIN

Cube Fall is more than a game — it's a workout for your mind. Every level is a small logic puzzle that sharpens your planning, spatial thinking, and problem-solving. Perfect for a quick mental break or a long, focused challenge.

FOR EVERYONE

Whether you're a puzzle veteran hunting for the next tough maze or just looking for a relaxing way to pass the time, Cube Fall Logic Puzzle has a level for you. Great for all ages.

Think you can roll your way to the last level? Download now and start solving!

Got feedback or a level idea? We'd love to hear from you.

newReleases.name: Meowdoku!
newReleases.desc:
Looking for a game that soothes the soul but keeps your brain spinning? Welcome to Meowdoku — a pure logic puzzle game that flawlessly blends the rigorous reasoning of Sudoku with the thrilling deduction of Minesweeper.

Here, you have only one mission: find the perfect "exclusive territory" for every aloof little cat!
Simple Rules, Deep Strategy

The concept is elegant and intuitive, yet anything but simple:
• Exclusive Territory: The board is divided into colored sections. You must place exactly one cat in each section.
• The Aloof Rule: Cats need absolute personal space! They absolutely cannot share the same row, column, or touch each other—not even diagonally.
• Risk & Reward: Double-tap a tile to place a cat. You only have 3 chances to make a mistake (hearts). Guess right, and you're rewarded with pure puzzle-solving satisfaction; guess wrong, and you lose a heart. Guessing won't save you; every single move must be carefully calculated!

Key Features
• Pure & Immersive Experience
• Non-Intrusive Ads: Zero interruptions to your gameplay, letting you fully enjoy a completely focused, Zen-like flow state.
• Play Offline Anytime: No internet required. Perfectly fills up the puzzle-shaped hole in your daily commute, time spent waiting in line, or your morning coffee break.

Wake up your mind with brand-new "Daily Puzzles" every single day.
Push your limits and see if you can break your fastest completion times on the global leaderboards. Why Meowdoku Will Stay on Your Phone M

updates.name: Amaze GO!
updates.desc:
Welcome to Amaze GO! A clean arrows puzzle game built to calm a busy mind. Every arrow points the way — what you need to do is to choose the right order. The design cuts visual noise, reduces chaos, and helps you organize thoughts as you play. Pick up an arrow. Find its lane. Repeat until the grid is yours. Enjoy the quiet flow offline anywhere and anytime.

What makes Amaze GO! great
1. Streamlined arrows puzzle that declutters the screen and the mind
2. Works offline with a clean interface that keeps attention on the board
3. Calm play loop for smart brains: think clearly, move each arrow with strategy
4. Smooth tap controls, clear path feedback, and satisfying release moments like ASMR

How to Play
- Find an arrow with a free path to the edge
- Tap to slide that arrow off the grid and open a lane for the next move
- Plan the order to secure a safe route and a clean board
- Long-Press to use Guidance to highlight directions when your path is unclear
- A wrong tap costs a heart for the level
- Clear the board to finish the level and aim for a perfect run
- Hints help focus when the grid feels tight

Why love this arrow puzzle
· Simple rules, profound strategy, and a meditative arrows puzzle
· Short breaks ease stress and sharpen focus
· The last arrow leaves the board with a satisfying mental reset
· Cognitive workout for sequencing and brain teasers
· Quiet visuals, plus a satisfying whoosh as each arrow flies off the grid — feedback that soothes instead of nags

updates.name: Food Hunt: Pixel Puzzle
updates.desc:
Every level is a pixel art masterpiece. Your ants will devour it - one color at a time.

Food Hunt is a satisfying color sort puzzle where the puzzle board IS the art. Each level presents a hand-crafted pixel art image built entirely from colored blocks. Sort your ants by color, send them in, and watch them eat the picture clean - block by block, until the board is empty and the level is cleared.

HOW TO PLAY
The board is filled with a pixel art image - built entirely from colored blocks. Below the board: your holding slots and block stacks waiting to be tapped.

Tap a block stack to load your ants. They march up and devour every matching colored block in the image. Clear all colors - wipe the board completely - and you win.

But choose your order carefully:

- Holding slots are limited - wrong tap order fills them fast
- Stuck slots = ants can't move = game over
- Plan which color to clear first
- Eat every last block - board empty - level clear!

THE PIXEL ART IS THE PUZZLE
Forget collecting rewards after you win. In Food Hunt, the pixel art image is the challenge itself.

Every level is a different image, built from hundreds of colored blocks. Watch your ants devour it layer by layer, color by color, until nothing remains.

You don't unlock the art. You clear it. And that's exactly what makes it satisfying.

FEATURES
-  200+ color sort puzzle levels -  new images, new challenges
-  Cute ants with ASMR-quality chomping animations
-  Simple one-tap controls - play with one h

updates.name: Pixel Flow!
updates.seller: Loom Games Oyun Yazilim ve Pazarlama Anonim Sirketi
updates.desc:
Conveyor’s ready, pigs are on standby. Tap to send a pig onto the conveyor so it rains balls onto pixel cubes of its own color. The number above its head is its ammo: that’s how many hits it makes. Run out and it leaves the stage; if not, it slips into one of the 5 waiting slots and, when you tap again, it jumps back on the conveyor to fire another round.
The conveyor has a capacity—push past the limit and you’ll need to wait. Send them in the right order, manage the flow, and hit the cubes to clear the board piece by piece. Simple mechanic, sticky loop: tap → flow → repeat.
Highlights
One-tap control: Quick sessions, easy one-handed play.
Color matching: Pigs only hit their own color—no target-picking hassle.
Conveyor capacity: Timing and queue management add a bite-size strategy layer.
5 waiting slots: Stack, sort, and launch at the perfect moment.
Short but “one more round” feel: Perfect for micro-breaks.
Satisfying pixel cleanup: Every hit leaves the board feeling crisp.
For anyone who loves fast action-puzzles, timing, and flow management. The pigs are ready. The cubes… not so much.

updates.name: Zen Word® - Relax Puzzle Game
updates.desc:
Playing Zen Word 10 minutes a day brings you incredible challenging and relaxing experiences.
 
Zen word is a challenging word game & brain game that helps to train your brain and sharpen your mind. Zen Word is much more challenging than most other word puzzle games. Unlike crossword puzzles games or word cross games or word scramble games, all words in Zen Word are uncrossed, without any logical connection that can give you hints to help you solve the puzzles.  In Zen Word, you need to search and connect the right letters to find 20 hidden words on average in each level to test your vocabulary. The length of the words is the only clue that will help you find all the words and solve the puzzles. Therefore, Zen Word has very high requirements for your vocabulary and spelling skills. All word puzzles in Zen Word are carefully designed and will definitely give you a completely different challenging experience. 

Also, Zen Word is very different from word-search games. In word search games, your objective is to find and mark all the words hidden inside the letters box. The arrangement of these words in word-search games has clear rules, even if you don't know the spelling of the words, you can still search and find all the hidden words to solve the puzzles. As you find more words, the difficulty of word search games gets easier. However in Zen Word, as you find more words, the difficulty of the game will increase sharply. updates.name: Jelly Busters: Puzzle Game
updates.desc:
Drop into the smoothest skatepark in town with the Jelly Busters crew, a squad of bouncy jellies who live to skate, color shoot, and bust their way through walls of cubes. Every run starts with a simple push on your board, a quick aim, and a clean shot as you send your jelly flying into a glowing, colorful puzzle blast of cubes hiding a secret picture and image below.

Jelly Busters adds a fun, skate-infused twist packed with ASMR pleasure and arcade-style thrills. With every tap, you shoot into stacks of colors, bust the cubes, and slowly keep busting the image underneath until the whole board is clear.

The sound and feel are tuned for maximum satisfying chill. Cubes crumble with soft pops, jellies bounce just right, and the whole game wraps you in a relaxing mood that still demands fast reaction and strategic thinking. It’s the perfect combination: a cube shooter that’s as soothing as it is intense, always very satisfying to clear the image at the end of a run.

But the park has tricks of its own. From the very first levels, you’ll see that this isn’t just mindless tapping. The game develops and gets more challenging and harder as you play, with clever layouts and sneaky blockers that force you to plan ahead. Each new level adds a fresh twist - more cubes, tougher patterns, and smarter obstacles that you’ll have to avoid if you want to keep your blast streak going.

To keep things interesting, you’ll unlock powerful level boosters that turn tight spots into epic comebacks.

updates.name: Yarn Loop: Knit Puzzle
updates.desc:
Yarn Loop is a relaxing and satisfying puzzle game featuring colorful yarn bobbins and knitted patterns.

Bobbins move onto the conveyor and collect stitches of their own color. Each bobbin has a capacity value that decreases as stitches are picked up. When its capacity reaches zero, the bobbin disappears. If capacity remains, the bobbin is transferred to the rack and can be used again later.
 
Complete each knitted pattern by using the right bobbins in the right order.

Game Features
► Simple One-Tap Gameplay: Bobbins move smoothly through the conveyor system and collect matching stitches with ease.
► Color-Based Collection Mechanic: Each bobbin clears only the stitches of its own color.
► Capacity Management System: Every bobbin has a limited pickup value, creating thoughtful and satisfying puzzle decisions.
► Rack Reuse Function: Bobbins that still have capacity return to the rack and remain available for later use.
► Hundreds of Engaging Levels: New knitted layouts, color combinations, and puzzle arrangements appear throughout progression.
► Cozy Yarn Aesthetic: Soft textures, warm colors, and pleasant animations create a calm and enjoyable experience.

Yarn Loop offers a smooth, calm, and visually charming journey through handcrafted yarn puzzles.

Kingshot is an innovative idle medieval survival game that combines strategic gameplay with rich details waiting to be explored.

When a sudden rebellion overturns the fate of an entire dynasty and ignites a devastating war, countless people lose their homes. In a world riddled with societal collapse, rebel invasions, rampant disease, and mobs desperate for resources, survival is the ultimate challenge. As a governor in these turbulent times, it's up to you to lead your people through these adversities, devising internal and diplomatic strategies to rekindle the spark of civilization.

[Core Features]

Defend Against Invasions
Stay vigilant and ready to repel invasions at any moment. Your town, the last bastion of hope, depends on it. Gather resources, upgrade your defenses, and prepare for battle to ensure survival in these tough times.

Manage Human Resources
Enjoy a unique gameplay mechanic involving the allocation of survivor roles such as workers, hunters, and chefs. Monitor their health and happiness to ensure they remain productive. Respond quickly to illness to make sure everyone receives timely treatment.

Establish Laws
Codes of law are vital for sustaining civilization and are crucial for the growth and strength of your town.

[Strategic Gameplay]

Resource Struggle
Amidst the sudden state collapse, the continent is flooded with untapped resources. Refugees, rebels, and power-hungry governors are all eyeing these precious materials. Ready yourself for battle and us

updates.name: Fate/Grand Order (English)
updates.desc:
A new mobile "Fate RPG," presented by TYPE-MOON!
With an impressive main scenario and multiple character quests, 
the game features millions of words of original story!
Packed with content that both fans of the Fate franchise and newcomers will be able to enjoy.

Summary

2017 A.D. 
Chaldea, an organization tasked with observing Earth's future, has confirmed that human history will be eliminated at 2019. 
Without warning, the promised future of 2017 disappeared.
Why? How? Who? By what means?
AD. 2004. A certain provincial town in Japan.
For the first time ever, a region that could not be observed appeared.
Assuming that this was the cause of humanity’s extinction, Chaldea carried out its sixth experiment - time travel into the past.
A forbidden ceremony where they would convert humans into Spiritrons and send them back in time. By intervening in events, they would locate, identify, and destroy the space-time Singularities.
The mission classification is an order to protect Humanity: Grand Order.
This is the title for those who would take a stand against human history and battle fate in order to protect mankind.

Game Introduction

A command card battle RPG optimized for smart phones! 
Players become Masters and together with Heroic Spirits, defeat enemies and solve the mystery of human history's disappearance. 
It's up the players to form a party with their favorite Heroic Spirits - both new and old. 

Game Composition/Scenario Direction
Kinoko Nasu

Character Design/Art Direc

updates.name: Castle Busters
updates.desc:
SMASH EVERY CASTLE. RULE EVERY ARENA.
Castle Busters is fast, loud, and unfair in the best way. Every brick breaks. Every shot counts. Draft 8 units, load your keep, and turn your rival's castle into a pile of rubble before they do it to you first. No grinding waves of bots. No 20-minute matches. Just real-time 1v1 PvP where one good angle wins the war.

DESTROY THE WALLS, NOT THE CLOCK
Matches are quick. Decisions are not. Pick your shot, read the enemy line, and fire. Every wall, tower and turret is destructible, so the map is never the same twice. Collapse a floor under an archer. Carve your own path, literally.

DRAFT YOUR SQUAD
Wrecker, Napalmer, Bomber, Scout, Fairy, Crow... Pick any 8. Each unit changes how you play, what angles you attack, and how you defend. Some builds are patient. Some are chaos. None of them are wrong if they win.

FORTIFY THE KEEP
Your castle is your army's home, shield, and weapon. Reinforce the walls that matter. Leave decoys. Bait your rival into breaking through somewhere they shouldn't. Defense isn't passive here, it's a trap.

THE FORGE
Upgrade your units. Strengthen your keep. Unlock new arenas with new hazards, new obstacles, new ways to break things. The deeper you go, the meaner the meta gets.

CLIMB THE LADDER
Climb your away towards Clash Colosseum. Arena by arena. Seasonal leaderboards. Rank matches against players who want your crown as badly as you want theirs. Only one castle stays standing. Sharpen your aim. Stack your squad. Cra

Leave everything behind and open a tiny bookshop by the sea in this cozy narrative management game. Stock your tiny bookshop with different books and items, set up your own shop in scenic locations, and run your second-hand bookshop while getting to know the locals.

Tiny Bookshop is an indie game made with love by a small team of book lovers, meant to bring a tiny utopia where bookselling dreams can come true to YOUR screens!

TRY BEFORE YOU BUY
You can try the first three days of the game for free! And if you like it, the full Tiny Bookshop experience is only a one-time purchase away! There are no ads or micro transactions in the game.

HIGHLIGHTS
* Decorate your Tiny Bookshop with the items you collect. Are you into absolutely plastering it with plants? Maybe a spooky candle-lit atmosphere is more your style? Every item also has an effect on your customers and can introduce new mechanics.
* Recommend real books to your customers, match the right book to the right person – or try to expand their literary horizon! Sometimes they just need a little help finding a book they will love!
* Befriend Bookstonbury's quirky cast of characters and help each other out!
* Stock books of different genres to satisfy the locals’ reading habits and watch your customers trickle in. Every place around town attracts a slightly different crowd, so get to know your audience and become a master bookseller!
* Explore the scenic places of charming Bookstonbury-by-the-Sea and learn the ins and outs

all.desc:
One sports quiz. Every day. Same seven questions for everyone.

Daily Drop is the daily ritual for baseball and football fans. Each day drops a fresh set of 7 questions - 4 MLB, 3 NFL - pulled from real stats and history. Everyone in the world gets the exact same set, so you and your group are always playing the same game.

Answer, lock it in, and watch your card come together like a broadcast stat overlay. Then share your score grid and see who read the box score this morning.

HOW IT WORKS
- 7 questions a day: 4 MLB, 3 NFL
- Mix of multiple choice and type-the-answer with autocomplete
- Real facts: season leaders, draft rounds, colleges, jersey numbers, and more
- The same set for everyone, every day - no two days repeat

KEEP YOUR STREAK
- Play every day to build your streak
- Miss a day and it resets - that's the game
- Track your accuracy, best streak, and perfect cards on your stats screen

SHARE YOUR SCORE
- A clean, collectible scorecard built to screenshot
- Share your result grid and challenge your friends
- Bragging rights, settled daily

BUILT RIGHT
- Works offline with instant load, no spinner
- Light and dark mode
- No account required. No data collected.

New questions drop daily. How long can you keep the streak alive?

Not affiliated with or endorsed by MLB or NFL.

all.name: Hear With Eyes
all.desc:
Hear with Eyes

How much of a conversation can you understand without relying on sound?

Hear with Eyes is an interactive quiz game that lets hearing users experience one aspect of deaf and hard-of-hearing communication through lip reading. Instead of simply explaining the challenges of lip reading, the app invites you to experience them firsthand.

Watch short lip movement animations and guess the spoken word using visual information. A faint, muffled audio cue is available, but the primary source of information is what you see—not what you hear.

Features

• Four difficulty levels from Easy to Extreme

• Progressive gameplay that encourages observation and inference

• Replay-based scoring system that rewards careful listening and viewing

• Clean and intuitive interface designed for focused learning

• Fully playable without relying on audio

Why Hear with Eyes?

Many people assume that sign language is the primary communication method for all deaf individuals. In reality, many deaf and hard-of-hearing people also use lip reading, spoken language, writing, gestures, or a combination of communication methods.

Hear with Eyes was created to encourage empathy through direct experience rather than explanation.

This app is not intended to replicate the lived experience of deaf or hard-of-hearing individuals. Instead, it offers an opportunity to better understand some of the cognitive effort involved in lip-reading–based communication.

hear this with your eyes closed
all.coreLoop:

Unlock your cognitive potential with NeuroSprint, the ultimate brain-training app designed to sharpen your mental reflexes, memory, and logic!

Whether you want to improve your focus, boost your math skills, or simply keep your mind active, NeuroSprint offers a diverse catalog of fast-paced, engaging mini-games tailored to challenge your mind.

5 BRAIN-BOOSTING CATEGORIES
• English Literacy: Expand your vocabulary and word recognition.
• Logic & Reasoning: Solve visual puzzles and sequence challenges like "Zoo Logic."
• Attention & Focus: Spot hidden changes and odd items in "Spotlight Search."
• Memory & Speed: Test your working memory with "Reverse Recall."
• Math Skills: Fire up your mental math with "Calculation Rush" and "Math Shooter."

TRACK YOUR NEURO PERFORMANCE
Measure your cognitive growth with the NeuroSprint Index (NSI). Our intelligent ELO-based scoring system dynamically adjusts the difficulty to match your unique skill level, ensuring you are always challenged but never overwhelmed. Watch your rank climb from Beginner to Genius!

DAILY STREAKS & DETAILED STATS
Build healthy habits with daily training streaks. Dive deep into your post-game statistics to see exactly where you excel and where you can improve.

PRIVACY FIRST (LOCAL DATA)
Your brain data belongs to you. NeuroSprint is designed with a privacy-first approach, processing and storing your game statistics and performance metrics securely and locally on your device.

Ready to give your brain a workout? D

all.name: SkeetGolf
all.desc:
Skeet Golf turns your iPhone into a gun scope. Tilt to aim at clay targets flying across the sky, then tap to fire — no joystick, no virtual buttons, just your phone's gyroscope.

Every hole is scored like golf: clear it in as few shooting rounds ("pulls") as you can, and try to beat par. Take your time — there's no clock. Read the hole, plan your shots, and close the app whenever you like. Your round is saved exactly where you left it.

FEATURES
- Gyroscope aiming — point your phone, don't drag a stick
- 18 hand-built holes across 6 distinct worlds, from a sunny driving range to a golden-sunrise grand finale
- Golf-style scoring: fewer pulls, better score, just like real golf
- Moving targets, wind, obstacles, and armored clays that take more than one hit
- A full round-history leaderboard — track your best rounds over time
- Unlockable guns with different feel and tradeoffs
- 100% free — no ads, no pay-to-win

Skeet Golf is built for pick-up-and-play sessions but rewards mastery: better aim and smarter shot selection both lower your score. Whether you've got two minutes or twenty, there's always one more to play.
all.coreLoop: Skeet Golf turns your iPhone into a gun scope. Tilt to aim at clay targets flying across the sky, then tap to fire — no joystick, no virtual buttons, just your phone's gyroscope.

all.name: Chrono-Tithe: Turn Timer
all.desc:
We have all been trapped in that pod. The board is a clogged mess, someone has been staring at their hand for ten minutes trying to sequence a cantrip, your cold brew is empty, and you are aging in real time.

Enter Chrono-Tithe.

Chrono-Tithe is not just a sleek life counter. It is an automated tax collector for slow play. Instead of a passive chess clock everyone ignores, it enforces an escalating “Tithe Tax.” Overstay your welcome in the think tank and your life total starts draining automatically. It is the perfect way to keep the table moving, or to quietly pressure the pod while you assemble your lock behind a wall of artifacts.

CORE FEATURES (always free)

THE TITHE ENGINE: An escalating turn timer that ramps through four tiers, from Standard to Accelerated to Punishing to Lethal. Choose the turn the tax starts to tighten and watch it change the way your pod plays.

BLIND-TAP LIFE TRACKING: Zero-friction split cards. Tap the right side of a player’s color block to gain life, tap the left to lose it. Press and hold to swing by 5 at a time. You never have to take your eyes off the board.

FULL COMMANDER TRACKING: Poison, energy, experience, +1/+1, commander tax, and per-source commander damage, with 21 from a single commander tracked and flagged automatically. Monarch and the Initiative too.

BUILT FOR THE TABLE: 2 to 6 players, format presets for Commander, 1v1, Two-Headed Giant, and Brawl, a pre-game lobby to set seating and decide who goes first, plus a dice roller,
all.releaseNotes:
NEW FORMATS
• Standard (20 life) and 1v1 Brawl (25 life) — proper 60-card duels.
• Duel formats lock to 2 players, and commander only counters
  (commander damage, tax) stay out of the way in 20-life games.

SEE HOW IT WENT
• New post-game graph: every player's life over the course of the
  game in their color — poison counters, eliminations, and final
  totals labeled right on the chart. It's on the share card too.

REMATCH, SETTLED FAIRLY
• Replay now asks who goes first in every format: roll a d20 each
  (ties re-roll), pick a player, or keep the same order.

SMOOTHER, SMARTER GAMES
• 10 poison counters now eliminates a player — and the game ends
  itself when only one player is standing.
• Hold − / + to change life 5 at a time.
• A player dying and a game ending now have their own soun

all.name: Block Fall Logic Puzzle
all.desc:
Roll the block, solve the puzzle, and drop it into the hole. Simple to learn, seriously hard to master.

Cube Fall Logic Puzzle is a brain-twisting 3D block rolling game inspired by classic block-rolling puzzles. Tip and roll your cube across floating tiles, avoid falling off the edge, and land perfectly into the goal. Every move counts — one wrong roll and you start again!

WHY YOU'LL LOVE IT

• Easy one-swipe controls — swipe up, down, left, or right to roll
• Hundreds of handcrafted levels, from relaxing warm-ups to true brain-burners
• Clever mechanics: switches, bridges, split tiles, and traps
• Minimal, satisfying 3D design that's easy on the eyes
• Unlockable cube skins to make each roll your own
• 100% playable offline — no wifi needed
• No pressure, no timer — solve at your own pace

TRAIN YOUR BRAIN

Cube Fall is more than a game — it's a workout for your mind. Every level is a small logic puzzle that sharpens your planning, spatial thinking, and problem-solving. Perfect for a quick mental break or a long, focused challenge.

FOR EVERYONE

Whether you're a puzzle veteran hunting for the next tough maze or just looking for a relaxing way to pass the time, Cube Fall Logic Puzzle has a level for you. Great for all ages.

Think you can roll your way to the last level? Download now and start solving!

Got feedback or a level idea? We'd love to hear from you.

all.name: Meowdoku!
all.desc:
Looking for a game that soothes the soul but keeps your brain spinning? Welcome to Meowdoku — a pure logic puzzle game that flawlessly blends the rigorous reasoning of Sudoku with the thrilling deduction of Minesweeper.

Here, you have only one mission: find the perfect "exclusive territory" for every aloof little cat!
Simple Rules, Deep Strategy

The concept is elegant and intuitive, yet anything but simple:
• Exclusive Territory: The board is divided into colored sections. You must place exactly one cat in each section.
• The Aloof Rule: Cats need absolute personal space! They absolutely cannot share the same row, column, or touch each other—not even diagonally.
• Risk & Reward: Double-tap a tile to place a cat. You only have 3 chances to make a mistake (hearts). Guess right, and you're rewarded with pure puzzle-solving satisfaction; guess wrong, and you lose a heart. Guessing won't save you; every single move must be carefully calculated!

Key Features
• Pure & Immersive Experience
• Non-Intrusive Ads: Zero interruptions to your gameplay, letting you fully enjoy a completely focused, Zen-like flow state.
• Play Offline Anytime: No internet required. Perfectly fills up the puzzle-shaped hole in your daily commute, time spent waiting in line, or your morning coffee break.

Wake up your mind with brand-new "Daily Puzzles" every single day.
Push your limits and see if you can break your fastest completion times on the global leaderboards. Why Meowdoku Will Stay on Your Phone M

all.name: Food Hunt: Pixel Puzzle
all.desc:
Every level is a pixel art masterpiece. Your ants will devour it - one color at a time.

Food Hunt is a satisfying color sort puzzle where the puzzle board IS the art. Each level presents a hand-crafted pixel art image built entirely from colored blocks. Sort your ants by color, send them in, and watch them eat the picture clean - block by block, until the board is empty and the level is cleared.

HOW TO PLAY
The board is filled with a pixel art image - built entirely from colored blocks. Below the board: your holding slots and block stacks waiting to be tapped.

Tap a block stack to load your ants. They march up and devour every matching colored block in the image. Clear all colors - wipe the board completely - and you win.

But choose your order carefully:

- Holding slots are limited - wrong tap order fills them fast
- Stuck slots = ants can't move = game over
- Plan which color to clear first
- Eat every last block - board empty - level clear!

THE PIXEL ART IS THE PUZZLE
Forget collecting rewards after you win. In Food Hunt, the pixel art image is the challenge itself.

Every level is a different image, built from hundreds of colored blocks. Watch your ants devour it layer by layer, color by color, until nothing remains.

You don't unlock the art. You clear it. And that's exactly what makes it satisfying.

FEATURES
-  200+ color sort puzzle levels -  new images, new challenges
-  Cute ants with ASMR-quality chomping animations
-  Simple one-tap controls - play with one h

all.name: Pixel Flow!
all.seller: Loom Games Oyun Yazilim ve Pazarlama Anonim Sirketi
all.desc:
Conveyor’s ready, pigs are on standby. Tap to send a pig onto the conveyor so it rains balls onto pixel cubes of its own color. The number above its head is its ammo: that’s how many hits it makes. Run out and it leaves the stage; if not, it slips into one of the 5 waiting slots and, when you tap again, it jumps back on the conveyor to fire another round.
The conveyor has a capacity—push past the limit and you’ll need to wait. Send them in the right order, manage the flow, and hit the cubes to clear the board piece by piece. Simple mechanic, sticky loop: tap → flow → repeat.
Highlights
One-tap control: Quick sessions, easy one-handed play.
Color matching: Pigs only hit their own color—no target-picking hassle.
Conveyor capacity: Timing and queue management add a bite-size strategy layer.
5 waiting slots: Stack, sort, and launch at the perfect moment.
Short but “one more round” feel: Perfect for micro-breaks.
Satisfying pixel cleanup: Every hit leaves the board feeling crisp.
For anyone who loves fast action-puzzles, timing, and flow management. The pigs are ready. The cubes… not so much.
all.releaseNotes: This version is all about better, faster, and more fun! Explore new places, enjoy smoother gameplay, and feel the polish in every tap. We fixed what needed fixing and added a few surprises too!

all.name: Zen Word® - Relax Puzzle Game
all.desc:
Playing Zen Word 10 minutes a day brings you incredible challenging and relaxing experiences.
 
Zen word is a challenging word game & brain game that helps to train your brain and sharpen your mind. Zen Word is much more challenging than most other word puzzle games. Unlike crossword puzzles games or word cross games or word scramble games, all words in Zen Word are uncrossed, without any logical connection that can give you hints to help you solve the puzzles.  In Zen Word, you need to search and connect the right letters to find 20 hidden words on average in each level to test your vocabulary. The length of the words is the only clue that will help you find all the words and solve the puzzles. Therefore, Zen Word has very high requirements for your vocabulary and spelling skills. All word puzzles in Zen Word are carefully designed and will definitely give you a completely different challenging experience. 

Also, Zen Word is very different from word-search games. In word search games, your objective is to find and mark all the words hidden inside the letters box. The arrangement of these words in word-search games has clear rules, even if you don't know the spelling of the words, you can still search and find all the hidden words to solve the puzzles. As you find more words, the difficulty of word search games gets easier. However in Zen Word, as you find more words, the difficulty of the game will increase sharply. The rest of the words are extremely hard for you to rememb

Drop into the smoothest skatepark in town with the Jelly Busters crew, a squad of bouncy jellies who live to skate, color shoot, and bust their way through walls of cubes. Jelly Busters adds a fun, skate-infused twist packed with ASMR pleasure and arcade-style thrills. With every tap, you shoot into stacks of colors, bust the cubes, and slowly keep busting the image underneath until the whole board is clear.

The sound and feel are tuned for maximum satisfying chill. It’s the perfect combination: a cube shooter that’s as soothing as it is intense, always very satisfying to clear the image at the end of a run.

But the park has tricks of its own. From the very first levels, you’ll see that this isn’t just mindless tapping. The game develops and gets more challenging and harder as you play, with clever layouts and sneaky blockers that force you to plan ahead. Each new level adds a fresh twist - more cubes, tougher patterns, and smarter obstacles that you’ll have to avoid if you want to keep your blast streak going.

To keep things interesting, you’ll unlock powerful level boosters that turn tight spots into epic comebacks.

all.name: Yarn Loop: Knit Puzzle
all.desc:
Yarn Loop is a relaxing and satisfying puzzle game featuring colorful yarn bobbins and knitted patterns.

Bobbins move onto the conveyor and collect stitches of their own color. Each bobbin has a capacity value that decreases as stitches are picked up. When its capacity reaches zero, the bobbin disappears. If capacity remains, the bobbin is transferred to the rack and can be used again later.
 
Complete each knitted pattern by using the right bobbins in the right order.

Game Features
► Simple One-Tap Gameplay: Bobbins move smoothly through the conveyor system and collect matching stitches with ease.
► Color-Based Collection Mechanic: Each bobbin clears only the stitches of its own color.
► Capacity Management System: Every bobbin has a limited pickup value, creating thoughtful and satisfying puzzle decisions.
► Rack Reuse Function: Bobbins that still have capacity return to the rack and remain available for later use.
► Hundreds of Engaging Levels: New knitted layouts, color combinations, and puzzle arrangements appear throughout progression.
► Cozy Yarn Aesthetic: Soft textures, warm colors, and pleasant animations create a calm and enjoyable experience.

Yarn Loop offers a smooth, calm, and visually charming journey through handcrafted yarn puzzles.

With gradually increasing difficulty and thousands of handcrafted levels, this game stands among the best games for iq improvement, training, and problem solving. Each level works like a compact jam session for your mind, pushing you to recognize patterns and adapt. This free game offers a unique merge of category sorting and word hunting.

When a level gets tricky, helpful boosters are there to support you:
Use the Booster Magnifying Glass to reveal a hidden category connection, the Booster Magnet to automatically pull matching bubbles together, and Add Bubble to give yourself more space and opportunities to clear the board.

• Category-based logic puzzles that are fun and easy to learn
• Relaxing yet challenging brain training game experience
• Thoughtful level design that blends crossword themes with sorting mechanics
• Offline-friendly play with no wifi games for free
• Precision controls, helpful boosters, and a scrabble-like strategy for extended sessions

Spend hours of relaxing fun playing Triple Match: A 3D puzzle matching game.

Sharpen your sorting skills, become a matching master and clear the board as fast as you can.

Spend a relaxing, fun time as you find and connect tiles and complete different missions with the help of awesome boosters and special effects.
Develop your skills by playing everywhere and as much as you want offline. Grab this amazing puzzle from the store and start searching for hidden objects today!    

How To Play:
* Tap on three identical  tiles and connect them into triples
* Keep sorting and matching objects until you clear all tiles from the screen
* Complete the goal set at the start of the level and become a master of 3d puzzle games!
* NOTE! Each level has a timer, so you must move fast & reach the level goal!
* Use boosters to help you sort through the objects and pass tricky levels
* Use Shuffle to rearrange the items on the board 

Fans of mahjong games will experience endless excitement and fun with this awesome match 3d game. Enjoy unique gameplay that will keep you busy for hours!
Put your logic and strategy skills to the test in this addicting Triple Match game and discover these Fun Features:

* Amazing boosters to help you along the way
* Beautifully designed match 3d levels
* Fun brain training missions
* Easy and relaxing tile matching game
* Free to play online or offline, no Wi-Fi or internet connection is required

Sunday City is an eternal summer simulator, where each day is like a weekend, and the city hums to the rhythm of your desires. You don't need to wait for a vacation here — ocean, sun, and neon city lights are always right there with you. Choose your lifestyle: calm and relaxed or full of drive and adventure. Start a Business

all.desc:
Discover Magic Sort! Mix colors in a world where every splash of water is a step into mystery. This isn’t just a game; it’s a journey through puzzles that sparkle with charm, inviting you to sort, match, and puzzle your way through.

Quick Play Guide

- Start Simple: Tap a bottle to pick it up, and another to pour the water. Organize the water so each bottle has only one color.
- Think Ahead: Pour water only if it matches the top color of the destination bottle and there’s room. Plan to avoid dead ends and strategically sort the colors.
- Embrace Complexity: With each level, sorting and matching require more thought. Every move is crucial.
- Utilize Magic Tools: Stuck? Use 'Undo' to reverse moves, or 'Shuffle' to rearrange the bottles anew, making sorting a breeze.

Cool Features

- Spellbinding Levels: Each stage brings a fresh challenge of color sorting and magical fun.
- Wizard’s Gear: Magic tools make your quest of water sorting smoother and way more fun.
- Vivid Splashes: A riot of colors makes every move a delight, turning sorting into a visual feast.
- Unique Twists: Classic puzzles get a magical makeover for extra thrill, blending color, water, and puzzle elements seamlessly.
- Boosts & Surprises: Stir up boosts in the cauldron to power through puzzles, adding a layer of strategy to your color sorting.
- Mystical Ingredients: Gather ingredients to brew stronger magic, enhancing your water sort adventures.

- Sharpen Your Brain: Each puzzle is a f

As a governor in these turbulent times, it's up to you to lead your people through these adversities, devising internal and diplomatic strategies to rekindle the spark of civilization.

Defend Against Invasions
Stay vigilant and ready to repel invasions at any moment. Your town, the last bastion of hope, depends on it. Gather resources, upgrade your defenses, and prepare for battle to ensure survival in these tough times.

Manage Human Resources
Enjoy a unique gameplay mechanic involving the allocation of survivor roles such as workers, hunters, and chefs. Monitor their health and happiness to ensure they remain productive. Respond quickly to illness to make sure everyone receives timely treatment.

Establish Laws
Codes of law are vital for sustaining civilization and are crucial for the growth and strength of your town.

- Start building sequences of the same suit in each foundation pile, chronologically, from ace to king.
- If you can no longer move any of the face-up cards, you can always tap the stockpile to see if it has any good cards for you to play.

A new mobile "Fate RPG," presented by TYPE-MOON!
With an impressive main scenario and multiple character quests, 
the game features millions of words of original story!
Packed with content that both fans of the Fate franchise and newcomers will be able to enjoy.

Summary

2017 A.D. 
Chaldea, an organization tasked with observing Earth's future, has confirmed that human history will be eliminated at 2019. 
Without warning, the promised future of 2017 disappeared.
Why? How? Who? By what means?
AD. 2004. A certain provincial town in Japan.
For the first time ever, a region that could not be observed appeared.
Assuming that this was the cause of humanity’s extinction, Chaldea carried out its sixth experiment - time travel into the past.
A forbidden ceremony where they would convert humans into Spiritrons and send them back in time. By intervening in events, they would locate, identify, and destroy the space-time Singularities.
The mission classification is an order to protect Humanity: Grand Order.
This is the title for those who would take a stand against human history and battle fate in order to protect mankind.

Game Introduction

A command card battle RPG optimized for smart phones! 
Players become Masters and together with Heroic Spirits, defeat enemies and solve the mystery of human history's disappearance. 
It's up the players to form a party with their favorite Heroic Spirits - both new and old.

all.name: Castle Busters
all.desc:
SMASH EVERY CASTLE. RULE EVERY ARENA.
Castle Busters is fast, loud, and unfair in the best way. Every brick breaks. Every shot counts. Draft 8 units, load your keep, and turn your rival's castle into a pile of rubble before they do it to you first. No grinding waves of bots. No 20-minute matches. Just real-time 1v1 PvP where one good angle wins the war.

DESTROY THE WALLS, NOT THE CLOCK
Matches are quick. Decisions are not. Pick your shot, read the enemy line, and fire. Every wall, tower and turret is destructible, so the map is never the same twice. Collapse a floor under an archer. Carve your own path, literally.

DRAFT YOUR SQUAD
Wrecker, Napalmer, Bomber, Scout, Fairy, Crow... Pick any 8. Each unit changes how you play, what angles you attack, and how you defend. Some builds are patient. Some are chaos. None of them are wrong if they win.

FORTIFY THE KEEP
Your castle is your army's home, shield, and weapon. Reinforce the walls that matter. Leave decoys. Bait your rival into breaking through somewhere they shouldn't. Defense isn't passive here, it's a trap.

THE FORGE
Upgrade your units. Strengthen your keep. Unlock new arenas with new hazards, new obstacles, new ways to break things. The deeper you go, the meaner the meta gets.

CLIMB THE LADDER
Climb your away towards Clash Colosseum. Arena by arena. Seasonal leaderboards. Rank matches against players who want your crown as badly as you want theirs. Only one castle stays standing. Sharpen your aim. Stack your squad. Cra
all.releaseNotes: Improvements and bug fixes.

all.name: Candy Crush Saga
all.desc:
Explore a world full of delicious match-3 puzzles and endless fun! Blast through thousands of challenging levels in this timeless puzzle game from King. Match candies, conquer jelly, toffees, and jam, and uncover sweet surprises in every puzzle.

Classic Match-3 Gameplay with Fresh Twists

- Discover unique game modes like Gummy Dragons and Bubblegum Pop. 
- Match and blast your way through matching levels full of sugar-coated fun.
- Master tricky puzzles and create explosive combos to clear the board!

Brain-Boosting Challenges & Special Events

- Daily Rewards: Log in every day to claim free boosters and extra lives.
- Time-Limited Events: Compete in themed challenges and win exclusive prizes.
- Tournaments & Leaderboards: Crush more candies than your friends and rise to the top to become the ultimate match-3 master!

Bonbon Blitz Your Way Through Extra Sticky Levels

- Use powerful boosters like Bonbon Blitz, Lollipop Hammer, and Jelly Fish to solve puzzles and boost your score.
- Stuck on a level? Boosters and extra moves will help you blast through any obstacle.

Play Offline or Online, Anytime and Anywhere

- No internet, no problem: Enjoy offline gameplay and keep the fun going wherever you are.
- Ad-free fun means uninterrupted candy-matching bliss!

Connect with Friends & Join the Candy Kingdom

- Share lives, compare scores, and see who’s the match-3 master in your friends circle.
- Connect your game to Facebook to sync progress, compete with friends, and unlock exc
all.releaseNotes:
We hope you’re having fun playing Candy Crush Saga! 

We update the game every week with sweet new features, exciting levels, and important bug fixes to keep everything running smoothly. 

Don't forget to download the latest version for the best experience!

New to the game? Don’t be shy, join the fun!

all.name: Flambé®: Merge and Cook
all.desc:
Dive into the delicious world of Flambé: Merge & Cook, where kitchen creativity knows no bounds! Merge ingredients, unlock new recipes, and build your culinary empire! Will you rule the kitchen or get burnt?

Merge Ingredients: 
Slice, chop, and flambé basic ingredients to create mouthwatering dishes! The more you merge, the more complex and exciting your recipes become!

Master Recipes: 
Unlock and master a wide variety of dishes, from appetizers to desserts. Can you cook up the ultimate feast?

Build Your Restaurant: 
Design and decorate your restaurant to attract customers. Watch your culinary empire grow as you serve up your unique creations in stunning locations. 

Stunning Graphics: 
Enjoy vibrant visuals and detailed animations that bring your kitchen and recipes to life.

Ready to become the ultimate chef? Download  Flambé: Merge & Cook now and start your culinary adventure today!
all.releaseNotes:
NEW CONTENT
Get ready to spice up your kitchens because our latest update is here, and it's hotter than ever!
NEW DISHES & INGREDIENTS: Dive into an array of fresh ingredients and delectable dishes!
NEW LOCATION: We've added a new location for you to explore and renovate!
BUG FIXES: We’ve been busy behind the scenes squashing pesky bugs!

all.name: Project Makeover
all.desc:
Give desperately needed makeovers to help people achieve their dreams! Choose highly fashionable clothes, hairstyles, makeup, and even furniture! Deal with dramatic characters like egotistical fashion icons, scheming assistants, or stubborn clients in dire need of a new wardrobe. Play challenging fashion-themed puzzles to help find that perfect look! And don't forget to customize your own signature style with your avatar!

CHOOSE from lots of fashionable clothes to create the perfect look!

MAKEOVER helpless clients and give them the confidence to follow their dreams!

DECORATE a person's room as well as their appearance!

DRAMA is everywhere, be ready to meet some extreme personalities!

SOLVE addictive puzzles with challenging obstacles!

STYLIZE your avatar to stand out on the red carpet!

VISIT FRIENDS and see how they dressed their avatar!

BLAST through levels with exciting power-ups with explosive benefits!

Support: Dear Director, are you having problems with the game? Visit https://support.projectmakeover.com/ or contact us in-game by going to Settings >Help >Contact Us.

Privacy Policy: https://www.projectmakeover.com/privacy-policy/
Terms of Service: https://www.projectmakeover.com/terms-of-service/
